title: rubus thyrsoideus var. pubescens
intro: Rubus thyrsoideus var. pubescens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsoideus var. pubescens include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
